infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TruckFlowUS needs your location to track deliveries while a job is in progress.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TruckFlowUS needs background location access to track deliveries even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TruckFlowUS needs camera access to take proof-of-delivery photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TruckFlowUS needs photo library access to upload proof-of-delivery images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: TruckFlowUS needs background location access to track deliveries.

plugins.cameraPermission: TruckFlowUS needs camera access to take proof-of-delivery photos.

plugins.photosPermission: TruckFlowUS needs photo library access for proof-of-delivery images.
